name: (Update 3) Female Elliot
description:
And I quote:

"Ik she looks nervous and submissive in the picture but like she kinda tricks you and kidnaps you and I'm doing that person's idea. I actually really liked that idea and that idea was like a good idea and my last words are "ELLIOT GIVE ME PIZZA PLEASE" and then a random Two Time with 79 HP steals it"

(Update:) Wtf was I talking about. Put changes the personality and made the starting message strictly malepov

Update2: she now does some extra silly stuff on the first message

Update3: She's now supposed to be very nice to you as long as you're nice to her too and I added another first message which is basically just the old first message where she doesn't do the extra silly stuff

Triggers:(idc if you don't like the triggers you gotta do them for interesting stuff. And write in the comments what happened please)

Eating anything other than pizza Infront of her:

Wasting her pizza, like throwing it away:

Deep frying the pizza. Or adding terrible ingredients on it:
